summary: Iteration 3 - Comprehensive final test COMPLETED. Fixed CORS issue for cluster origins. All features working: Homepage, Prestations (14), Reservation 3-step flow with Stripe, Admin login/dashboard, Mobile responsive navigation.

fixed.fix: Added cluster pattern regex to allowed CORS origins in server.js

fixed.issue: Rate limiter X-Forwarded-For header validation error
fixed.fix: Added validate: { xForwardedForHeader: false } and trust proxy setting

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. CORS fix applied for cluster origins. Rate limiter configured for reverse proxy. Admin login works. Reservation 3-step flow with Stripe card form works. Mobile responsive navigation works.

homepage.details: Hero image visible, 3 featured services, 3 testimonials, 4 FAQ items, CTA buttons working

prestations_page.details: 14 prestations displayed, category filter works (5 categories), search/price/duration filters work, reset filters works

reservation_step1.details: 14 prestation options displayed, clicking prestation advances to step 2

reservation_step2.details: 12 dates shown (48h+ in future, starting March 30), 19 time slots per date, clicking date loads creneaux

reservation_step3.details: Client form (nom, email, telephone), Stripe CardElement visible after filling form, payment info shows 30% acompte

admin_login.details: Login with admin@glowshape.fr/admin123 works, redirects to dashboard

admin_dashboard.details: Shows 14 prestations, 5 reservations, 1 unread message, recent reservations list

mobile_responsive.details: Burger menu visible on mobile, opens navigation with all links

api_prestations.details: Returns 14 prestations with all required fields

api_disponibilites.details: Returns 19 time slots for 2026-04-01, all disponible=true

api_stripe_validation.details: create-setup-intent rejects missing fields with proper error message

security_headers.details: x-content-type-options: nosniff, x-frame-options: SAMEORIGIN, referrer-policy: no-referrer present
